---
title: "Glossary"
---

A running glossary of the mathematical, statistical, and R terms used in this
course. Add terms here as the material is written; keep definitions short and
link to a fuller treatment where one exists.

<!-- Suggested entries to fill in:
  - scalar, vector, matrix
  - matrix product, transpose, identity, inverse
  - rank, linearly independent
  - solution space (unique / none / infinitely many)
  - eigenvalue, eigenvector
  - covariance matrix
  - PCA, latent space, principal component
  - OLS / ordinary least squares, design matrix, residual
  - Markov chain, transition matrix, stationary distribution
  - PMF / PDF, expectation, variance
  - Poisson distribution, negative binomial, overdispersion
  - prior, likelihood, posterior; Bayesian vs frequentist
  - chemometrics
-->
